description_long: This is a tall, rectangular apartment building with a modern design, featuring a light blue and white color scheme. The structure has multiple floors, each with rows of evenly spaced windows and balconies, providing a sense of symmetry and order. The building sits on a raised base and includes a flat rooftop with some greenery and utility structures visible. Vertical columns and horizontal bands accentuate the facade, and the windows are grouped in regular patterns across all sides. There are a few trees and shrubs at the base, adding a touch of landscaping to the urban setting. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, multi-story apartment building with blue and white facades, regular rows of windows and balconies, and a flat rooftop with greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with prominent balconies, vertical blue columns, and a clear view of the rooftop details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, additional balconies, and the continuation of the blue and white color scheme.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows and balconies, as well as some landscaping at the base of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible trees at the base, a clear look at the flat roof, and the building's overall height.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in symmetrical, evenly spaced horizontal rows on each floor, with each row aligned vertically across the building's facade. Most windows are paired with balconies, creating a regular and organized pattern.
